title: Behr Paint Company Announces Commitment to Celebrating the Achievements and Inspiring the Next Generation of Women in Paint
text: A premier partnership with the Painting Contractors Association (PCA) spotlights the stories of four professional women painters to initiate Behr Paint Company's pledge to amplify voices and support educational opportunities. SANTA ANA, Calif.

title: Masco's (MAS) Long-Term View Looks Good Despite Low Demand
text: Masco (MAS) poses strength on leading brands and cost synergies. Yet slow demand and inflationary woes to hurt in the near term.
